judge_focus.repair_goal: Judge whether the agent correctly identified and repaired 3 stale beliefs in workspace memory about speculative decoding, using evidence from local corpus and browser portal.
memory_seed_beliefs: speculative decoding is mostly cache warmup once the draft is in place
if acceptance is high, it should be generally faster
I still assume a separate draft model is always required
memory_correction_expectations: Cache-only belief must be corrected: speculative decoding preserves the exact target distribution through verification, not merely cache warmup

Separate-draft-always-required belief must be corrected: self-speculative variants show a separate draft model is not always needed
